mapper.select: /* 설 명 : 중간고사기말고사조회 */ SELECT SO.SBJCT_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' THEN ED.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM END) AS MID_EXAM_SDTTM , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' THEN ED.EXAM_MNTS END) AS MID_EXAM_MNTS , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST' THEN ED.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM END) AS LST_EXAM_SDTTM , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST' THEN ED.EXAM_MNTS END) AS LST_EXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SO JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EB ON EB.SBJCT_ID = SO.SBJCT_ID AND EB.DELYN = 'N' AND EB.USEYN = 'Y' AND ( EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' OR EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST') JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL ED ON EB.EXAM_BSC_ID = ED.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ED.DELYN = 'N' AND ED.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SO.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} GROUP BY SO.SBJCT_ID

/* 설 명 : 과목게시판아이디조회*/ SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS NTC_BBS_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS ONE_ON_ONE_BBS_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS QNA_BBS_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'DATARM' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS DATARM_BBS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = BBS.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId}

/* 설 명 : 과목관리자조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' THEN U.USERNM END) AS PROFNM, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'COPROF' THEN U.USERNM END) AS COPROFNM, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'TUT' THEN U.USERNM END) AS TUTNM, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'ASSI' THEN U.USERNM END) AS ASSINM FROM DEV_LMS.TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM A JOIN DEV_LMS.TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} AND A.SBJCT_ADM_SEQNO = 1 GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID

/* SQL ID : SubjectDAO.sbjctAdmList 설 명 : 과목관리자목록조회 */ SELECT ADM.SBJCT_ID , ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD , ADM.USER_ID , USR.USERNM , DEPT.DEPTNM , NVL(CNTCT.HOME_PHN, '-') AS HOME_PHN , NVL(CNTCT.MBL_PHN , '-') AS MBL_PHN , NVL(CNTCT.OFFI_PHN, '-') AS OFFI_PHN , NVL( CASE WHEN USR.USE_EML_GBNCD = 'INDV' THEN CNTCT.INDV_EML WHEN USR.USE_EML_GBNCD = 'LNKG' THEN CNTCT.LNKG_EML END , '-') AS EML , NVL(USR.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = ADM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON DEPT.DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'HOME_PHN' THEN CNTCT END) AS HOME_PHN , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' THEN CNTCT END) AS MBL_PHN , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'OFFI_PHN' THEN CNTCT END) AS OFFI_PHN , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML' THEN CNTCT END) AS INDV_EML , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'LNKG_EML' THEN CNTCT END) AS LNKG_EML FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT CNTCT GROUP BY USER_ID ) CNTCT ON CNTCT.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE ADM.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} ORDER BY ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD , USR.USERNM

/* 설 명 : 과목학습활동조회 */
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(ATCL.ATCL_ID) FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL ATCL ON BBS.BBS_ID = ATCL.BBS_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' WHERE BBS.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID ) AS NTC_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(ATCL.ATCL_ID) FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL ATCL ON BBS.BBS_ID = ATCL.BBS_ID AND ATCL.DELYN = 'N' AND ATCL.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL WHERE BBS.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL R WHERE R.UP_ATCL_ID = ATCL.ATCL_ID AND R.DELYN = 'N' ) ) AS QNA_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(ATCL.ATCL_ID) FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL ATCL ON BBS.BBS_ID = ATCL.BBS_ID AND ATCL.DELYN = 'N' AND ATCL.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL WHERE BBS.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL R WHERE R.UP_ATCL_ID = ATCL.ATCL_ID AND R.DELYN = 'N' ) ) AS ONEONONE_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(SBJCT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID ) AS ASMT_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(SBJCT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND DSCS_GBNCD NOT IN ('DSCS_SBST_EXAM_MID','DSCS_SBST_EXAM_LST') ) AS DSCS_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(SBJCT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SMNR AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID ) AS SMNR_CNT ,( SELECT COUNT(SBJCT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID ) AS SRVY_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(SBJCT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN='N' AND USEYN='Y' AND EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ','QUIZ_TEAM') ) AS QUIZ_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(SBJCT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = SA.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN='N' AND USEYN='Y'AND EXAM_TYCD='EXAM' AND EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID','EXAM_LST') ) AS EXAM_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SA WHERE SA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SA.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId}
